name: AMPCO PITTSBURGH CORP
business: AMPCO PITTSBURGH manufactures and sells forged hardened steel rolls, cast rolls, and forged engineered products for the steel, aluminum, oil and gas, and extrusion industries. It also produces custom-engineered finned tube heat exchange coils, large custom-designed air handling systems, and centrifugal pumps for power generation, defense, industrial, and commercial markets.

exposures.sentence: FEP principally are sold to customers in the steel distribution market, the oil and gas industry, and the aluminum and plastic extrusion industries.
Higher volume of shipments to customers in the nuclear industry of approximately $4,800;
the businesses are benefiting from increased demand in the power generation and U.S. military markets
Buffalo Pumps manufactures centrifugal pumps for the fossil-fueled power generation, marine defense and industrial refrigeration industries.
